title: citrus × bigaradia var. myrtifolia
intro: Citrus × bigaradia var. myrtifolia, also known as the Bigarade Orange or Bergamot Orange, is a hybrid citrus plant that is primarily cultivated for its essential oil, which is extracted from its rind. The medicinal properties of Citrus × bigaradia var. myrtifolia include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antidepressant properties, making it a popular ingredient in aromatherapy and herbal remedies. The health benefits of consuming or inhaling the essential oil of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, improving mood, and alleviating symptoms of depression, as well as supporting immune function and digestive health. Citrus × bigaradia var. myrtifolia can be consumed as a tea, taken as a supplement, or inhaled through steam inhalation or essential oil diffusers, offering a natural and holistic approach to maintaining overall well-being.
